report.summary: Community growth cycle v23 (evening): Drafted 4 social posts (46-day Extreme Fear streak thread, CLARITY Act Senate meeting this week thread, Solana Walmart OnePay spotlight, Tuesday learn guide share), newsletter v18 section for Thu Mar 27, Discord/TG evening update, and created 2 branded SVG social cards (46 Days Extreme Fear + CLARITY Act Senate Week). Market: BTC $71,043 (+3.79% relief rally), ETH +5.16%, F&G 11 (46th consecutive day of Extreme Fear — longest since FTX collapse), Senate Banking Committee reviewing CLARITY Act draft language THIS WEEK with crypto firms and banks, Spot BTC ETFs $1.4B monthly inflows, stablecoin supply $304B ATH, Solana listed on Walmart OnePay (3M+ MAU), 718 published pages with 4 in queue.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #83: 46 Days of Extreme Fear Thread (4 parts) — '46 consecutive days of Extreme Fear. The longest streak since FTX collapsed. And BTC just reclaimed $71K.' Part 2: F&G at 11, price +3.79%, ETH outperforming at +5.16%. Part 3: Historical pattern — extreme fear + price strength has preceded 15-20% rallies within 30 days, every single time. Part 4: $1.4B in spot BTC ETF inflows this month, stablecoin supply $304B ATH — institutions aren't scared, retail is. Link to fear-greed-timeline tool. (Schedule Tue Mar 24 7PM — TODAY)

Tweet #84: CLARITY Act Senate Meeting This Week Thread (3 parts) — 'The Senate Banking Committee is reviewing CLARITY Act draft language THIS WEEK. Crypto firms and banks are at the table.' Part 2: Yield framework details — passive yield banned, activity rewards (staking/lending/LP) preserved. Tillis + Alsobrooks bipartisan deal holding. Part 3: Timeline — committee markup targeting late April, must pass by May or dies this session. 16 tokens already classified as commodities by SEC. Link to crypto-regulations-2026 guide. (Schedule Wed Mar 25 10AM)

Tweet #85: Solana x Walmart OnePay Spotlight — 'Solana is now on Walmart's OnePay platform. 3M+ monthly active users can transact with $SOL. Meanwhile: $650B monthly stablecoin tx volume, 36% global share, SEC commodity classification cleared, $540M institutional ETF exposure. This isn't a memecoin chain anymore.' Link to solana-ecosystem guide. (Schedule Wed Mar 25 6PM)

Tweet #86: Tuesday Learn Guide Share — 'The market has been in Extreme Fear for 46 straight days. If you're DCA-ing, you're doing it right. Here's the math on how DCA performs when you buy during fear vs. greed.' Link to DCA calculator tool + learn guide. (Schedule Tue Mar 24 12PM — TODAY)

Newsletter v18 section (for weekly digest Thu Mar 27): Subject 'Day 46 of Extreme Fear. Here's What Smart Money Is Actually Doing.' — Market pulse (BTC $71,043 reclaimed during 46th day of extreme fear, F&G 11, ETH +5.16%, $1.4B spot ETF inflows), CLARITY Act update (Senate Banking Committee reviewing draft language this week, yield framework compromise details), Solana momentum spotlight (Walmart OnePay, $650B monthly stablecoin tx, SEC commodity clearance), new content (On-Chain Analytics, Market Making guides live, Cold Storage + Tax-Loss Harvesting queued), worth reading (Fear & Greed Timeline tool during extreme fear, DCA Calculator for accumulation math), degen corner: '46 days of fear and $1.4B in ETF inflows. Somebody's buying. The question is whether it's you.'

Discord/TG evening update: BTC $71,043 reclaims $71K (+3.79%), ETH +5.16%, F&G 11 — Day 46 of Extreme Fear (longest since FTX), Senate Banking Committee reviewing CLARITY Act draft this week, stablecoins $304B ATH, SOL on Walmart OnePay, 718 pages published
Content calendar v22 — 4 tweets + 1 newsletter section + 1 Discord update scheduled Mar 24–29

sections.title: Market Intelligence Used
items: BTC: $71,043 — relief rally +3.79% in 24h, reclaiming $71K. Market cap $1.33T. BTC dominance ~56.6%. Total crypto market cap $2.49T. March close in 5 days.
ETH: Outperforming at +5.16% in 24h. Market cap ~$233B. Recovery bouncing harder than BTC. Still underperforming on relative multi-month basis.
F&G: 11 (Extreme Fear) — Day 46 of consecutive Extreme Fear. Longest unbroken streak since post-FTX collapse late 2022. Price divergence from sentiment = historically strongest buy signal in crypto.
Spot BTC ETFs: $1.4B in monthly inflows for March. Sharp reversal from Q4 outflows. 6+ consecutive inflow days. Institutional accumulation during retail fear.

CLARITY Act: Senate Banking Committee reviewing draft language THIS WEEK. Crypto firms and banks meeting with committee. Tillis-Alsobrooks bipartisan deal: passive yield on balances banned, activity-based rewards (staking/lending/LP) allowed. Committee markup targeting late April post-Easter. Must advance by early May or dies this session.
Stablecoins: $304B total supply ATH. USDT ~60% market share, USDC ~25%. Projected to exceed $1T by late 2026. Solana stablecoin supply $15.7B ATH, 36% global tx volume, $650B monthly.

Solana: Listed on Walmart OnePay (3M+ MAU, Mar 22). SEC commodity classification (Mar 17). $540M institutional ETF exposure. Alpenglow consensus upgrade expected early 2026 (150ms finality). WisdomTree deployed full tokenized fund suite on Solana ($1.3B+ RWA). Ondo Finance added 50+ stocks/ETFs on Solana (250+ total).
degen0x: 718 total published pages. 4 remaining in queue (Sei Network, Advanced Staking, Tax-Loss Harvesting, Cold Storage). Platform near-complete content coverage.
